title: delivery: card preview insertion clones entire JSON object unnecessarily
description: In process_batch, inserting the 'preview' field into activity['object'] is done by calling .as_object().cloned() to get an owned copy of the entire object map, inserting the field, then replacing the original value (lines 254-261). serde_json::Value::as_object_mut() returns a mutable reference to the map in place. Using that would avoid cloning the entire Note object on every post that has a card preview.
close_reason: Fixed: card preview inserted via direct assignment, no JSON clone.
